mapper.sql:
SELECT w.SERVICE_NO as serviceNo, w.CONTRACT_NO as contractNo, w.SUB_CD as subCd, w.REQ_DT as reqDt, w.REQ_COMP_CD as reqCompCd, w.REQ_USER_ID as reqUserId, w.STATUS_CD as statusCd, w.PROC_DT as procDt, w.PROC_USER_NM as procUserNm, w.PROC_SUPPORT_CD as procSupportCd, w.PROC_RESULT_CD as procResultCd, w.REG_ID as regId, w.REQ_CONTENTS as reqContents, w.PROC_CONTENTS as procContents,
(SELECT CODE_TEXT FROM TC_COMMON_CODE WHERE CODE_CD = w.PROC_SUPPORT_CD) as procSupportNm, (SELECT CODE_TEXT FROM TC_COMMON_CODE WHERE CODE_CD = w.PROC_RESULT_CD) as procResultNm, (SELECT CODE_TEXT FROM TC_COMMON_CODE WHERE CODE_CD = w.STATUS_CD) as statusNm,
p.SW_CODE as swCd, s.SW_NAME as swNm, c.CODE_TEXT as serviceCdNm, cd.COMPANY_NM as customerCompanyNm, cd.DEPARTMENT_NM as customerDepartmentNm, cd.MANAGE_NM as customerManageNm, ru.USER_NM as reqUserNm, ru.USER_DEPT_NM as userDeptNm, rd.DEPARTMENT_NM as reqUserDepartmentNm, rd.COMPANY_NM as reqUserCompanyNm, pd.COMPANY_NM as procCompanyNm, cert.CERT_CD as certCd, cert.CERT_DT as certDt, COALESCE(sv.POINT_DIS_YN, 'N') as pointDisYn, ptd.COMPANY_NM as partnerCompanyNm FROM TS_WORK_HISTORY w INNER JOIN TS_WORK_SW_PARTNER p ON w.SUB_CD = p.SUB_CODE INNER JOIN TS_WORK_SW s ON p.SW_CODE = s.SW_CODE INNER JOIN TC_USER ru ON w.REQ_USER_ID = ru.USER_ID LEFT JOIN TS_WORK_SURVEY sv ON sv.SERVICE_NO = w.SERVICE_NO LEFT JOIN TC_COMMON_CODE c ON c.CODE_CD = w.SERVICE_CD LEFT JOIN V_ORGANIZATION_STRUCTURE cd ON w.REQ_COMP_CD = cd.ORIGIN_CD LEFT JOIN V_ORGANIZATION_STRUCTURE rd ON ru.DEPT_CD = rd.ORIGIN_CD LEFT JOIN V_ORGANIZATION_STRUCTURE pd ON w.PROC_DEPT_CD = pd.ORIGIN_CD LEFT JOIN V_ORGANIZATION_STRUCTURE ptd ON p.COMP_CODE = ptd.ORIGIN_CD LEFT JOIN TS_WORK_CERT cert ON w.SERVICE_NO = cert.SERVICE_NO
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT w.SERVICE_NO) FROM TS_WORK_HISTORY w INNER JOIN TS_WORK_SW_PARTNER p ON w.SUB_CD = p.SUB_CODE INNER JOIN TS_WORK_SW s ON p.SW_CODE = s.SW_CODE INNER JOIN TC_USER ru ON w.REQ_USER_ID = ru.USER_ID LEFT JOIN TS_WORK_SURVEY sv ON sv.SERVICE_NO = w.SERVICE_NO LEFT JOIN V_ORGANIZATION_STRUCTURE cd ON w.REQ_COMP_CD = cd.ORIGIN_CD LEFT JOIN V_ORGANIZATION_STRUCTURE rd ON ru.DEPT_CD = rd.ORIGIN_CD LEFT JOIN V_ORGANIZATION_STRUCTURE pd ON w.PROC_DEPT_CD = pd.ORIGIN_CD LEFT JOIN V_ORGANIZATION_STRUCTURE ptd ON p.COMP_CODE = ptd.ORIGIN_CD
GROUP BY w.SERVICE_NO ORDER BY w.REG_DT DESC
SELECT SERVICE_NO FROM TS_WORK_HISTORY WHERE SERVICE_NO LIKE CONCAT(#{prefix}, '%')

SELECT h.SERVICE_NO as serviceNo, h.CONTRACT_NO as contractNo, h.SUB_CD as subCd, s.SW_CODE as swCode, s.SW_NAME as swName, h.SERVICE_CD as serviceCd, h.REQ_DT as reqDt, h.REQ_USER_ID as reqUserId, u.USER_NM as reqUserNm, h.REQ_COMP_CD as reqDeptCd, h.REQ_USER_CONTRACT_TYPE as reqUserContractType, h.STATUS_CD as statusCd, req.COMPANY_NM as requestCompanyNm, req.DEPARTMENT_NM as requestDepartmentNm, req.MANAGE_NM as requestManageNm, h.REQ_SUPPORT_CD as reqSupportCd, con.COMPANY_NM as contractCompanyNm, con.DEPARTMENT_NM as contractDepartmentNm, con.MANAGE_NM as contractManageNm, h.REQ_CONTENTS as reqContents, h.PROC_DT as procDt, h.PROC_SUPPORT_CD as procSupportCd, h.PROC_USER_NM as procUserNm, proc.COMPANY_NM as procCompanyNm, h.PROC_CONTENTS as procContents, h.PROC_RESULT_CD as procResultCd, h.REMARK as remark, h.REG_ID as regId FROM TS_WORK_HISTORY h INNER JOIN TS_WORK_CONTRACT c ON h.CONTRACT_NO = c.CONTRACT_NO INNER JOIN TS_WORK_SW_PARTNER p ON h.SUB_CD = p.SUB_CODE INNER JOIN TS_WORK_SW s ON p.SW_CODE = s.SW_CODE INNER JOIN TC_USER u ON h.REQ_USER_ID = u.USER_ID LEFT JOIN V_ORGANIZATION_STRUCTURE req ON u.DEPT_CD = req.ORIGIN_CD LEFT JOIN V_ORGANIZATION_STRUCTURE con ON c.DEPT_CD = con.ORIGIN_CD LEFT JOIN V_ORGANIZATION_STRUCTURE proc ON p.COMP_CODE = proc.ORIGIN_CD WHERE h.SERVICE_NO = #{serviceNo}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TS_WORK_HISTORY ( SERVICE_NO, CONTRACT_NO, SUB_CD, SERVICE_CD, REQ_DT, STATUS_CD, REQ_COMP_CD, REQ_USER_ID, REQ_SUPPORT_CD, REQ_CONTENTS, REQ_USER_CONTRACT_TYPE, PROC_DT, PROC_USER_NM, PROC_DEPT_CD, PROC_SUPPORT_CD, PROC_CONTENTS, PROC_RESULT_CD, REMARK, MOD_ID, MOD_DT, REG_ID, REG_DT ) VALUES ( #{serviceNo}, #{contractNo}, #{subCd}, #{serviceCd}, #{reqDt}, #{statusCd}, #{reqCompCd}, #{reqUserId}, #{reqSupportCd}, #{reqContents}, #{reqUserContractType}, #{procDt}, #{procUserNm}, #{procDeptCd}, #{procSupportCd}, #{procContents}, #{procResultCd}, #{remark}, #{modId}, #{modDt}, #{regId}, #{regDt} )
mapper.update: UPDATE TS_WORK_HISTORY SET SERVICE_CD = #{serviceCd}, REQ_DT = #{reqDt}, REQ_SUPPORT_CD = #{reqSupportCd}, REQ_CONTENTS = #{reqContents}, PROC_DT = #{procDt}, PROC_SUPPORT_CD = #{procSupportCd}, STATUS_CD = #{statusCd}, PROC_CONTENTS = #{procContents}, REMARK = #{remark}, MOD_DT = #{modDt}, MOD_ID = #{modId} WHERE SERVICE_NO = #{serviceNo}
